en_title: Kingdom Come: Deliverance Developer Teases Its Lord of the Rings Open World RPG
cn_title: 《天国：拯救》开发商预告其《指环王》开放世界RPG

paragraphs.cn: 更新时间：2026年5月27日 09:00 UTC（北京时间5月27日17:00）

paragraphs.en: Warhorse Studios, the team behind Kingdom Come: Deliverance, has teased its upcoming Lord of the Rings game, and it sounds very exciting indeed.
paragraphs.cn: 《天国：拯救》的开发团队Warhorse Studios为旗下即将到来的《指环王》游戏放出了一些预告，听起来确实非常令人期待。

paragraphs.en: Last week, Warhorse confirmed it is making a new game set in the Lord of the Rings universe following months of speculation. When Warhorse announced the Lord of the Rings game, it called it an "open world Middle-earth RPG," so it's unclear which era of Tolkien's fantasy setting the game takes place. But it seems likely to follow the template established by the studio's hugely popular Kingdom Come: Deliverance games.
paragraphs.cn: 上周，在外界数月猜测之后，Warhorse证实工作室正在开发一款以《指环王》宇宙为背景的新游戏。Warhorse在公布该游戏时称其为「开放世界中土RPG」，因此尚不清楚游戏会落在托尔金奇幻设定中的哪个时代。但本作很可能延续工作室广受好评的《天国：拯救》系列所确立的模板。

paragraphs.en: The project is expected to still be a ways off from releasing, meaning we probably won't see it for a while. However, Warhorse teased some details during a recent community stream.
paragraphs.cn: 本项目预计距离发售还有相当长的时间，意味着短期内我们看不到。不过Warhorse在最近一次社区直播中透露了一些细节。

paragraphs.en: During the stream, Warhorse communications director Tobias Stolz-Zwilling said the next Kingdom Come game will release next fiscal year, meaning it's approximately a year or so away from release. The Lord of the Rings game, however, doesn't have a concrete timeline that can be shared yet, which suggests it's likely years away from seeing the light of day.
paragraphs.cn: 直播中，Warhorse传播总监Tobias Stolz-Zwilling表示，下一部《天国：拯救》游戏将于下一财年发售——也就是大约一年左右的时间。而《指环王》游戏目前没有具体的时间表可以分享，这暗示它距离面世可能还有数年之遥。

paragraphs.en: The Middle-earth team is led by Viktor Bocan, the design director on Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2. Stolz-Zwilling noted that the Middle-earth game is a "passion project" and there's a "mind-blowing team" that's ready to dive deep into the universe to make a great game. He also described the game as "deeply immersive," with a "living world" packed with "interesting characters, memorable places, and of course a strong narrative focus." He went on to state that the team strives to be the "new kings" of the RPG genre with every project it makes, both in Kingdom Come and Middle-earth, and wants to continue to lean on the studio's formula that fans love so much.
paragraphs.cn: 中土项目由Viktor Bocan领衔——他此前担任《天国：拯救2》的设计总监。Stolz-Zwilling指出，这款中土游戏是工作室的「热爱之作（passion project）」，团队成员「阵容惊人」，准备深入这个奇幻世界打造一款杰作。他还形容这款游戏「沉浸感极强」，世界「鲜活生动」，里面有「有趣的角色、令人难忘的地点，当然还有强烈的叙事专注」。他进一步表示，团队的目标是让自己的每一部作品——无论是《天国：拯救》还是中土项目——都成为RPG品类的「新王」，并继续延续工作室让粉丝深爱的那套创作公式。

paragraphs.en: "It's important to remind everyone we are only working on the games we want to work on in the way we want to work on them," Stolz-Zwilling continued. "It's our stuff."
paragraphs.cn: 「重要的是要让大家明白，我们只做我们想做的游戏，并以我们想要的方式去做。」Stolz-Zwilling继续说，「这是属于我们自己的东西。」

paragraphs.en: "That stands us a bit apart a little bit... without s**t-talking anyone... only a little bit! Stands us a bit apart from maybe other big studios. As long as we have this power and trust I think we will absolutely rock."
paragraphs.cn: 「这一点让我们与其他工作室稍有不同……不是要说谁的坏话……只是稍微有点不同！或许让我们和某些大型工作室不太一样。只要我们仍拥有这种自主权和信任，我相信我们绝对能做出精彩的作品。」

paragraphs.en: There are a lot of Middle-earth games out there, including Shadow of Mordor and Shadow of War, which are some of the most beloved modern games in the franchise. However, there has never been an expansive and proper RPG in the universe. Most games in the series are action/adventure games, MMOs, or strategy games. Warhorse is looking to scratch an itch that fans have had for years, not unlike IO Interactive being tapped to make a 007 game after years of fan requests.
paragraphs.cn: 目前市面上已有不少中土题材游戏，包括《中土世界：暗影魔多》和《中土世界：战争之影》等近年来颇受好评的作品。然而中土宇宙至今还没有过一款真正意义上规模宏大的RPG。该系列大多数作品都是动作/冒险游戏、MMO或者策略游戏。Warhorse此举意在填补粉丝多年的需求空白——这与IO Interactive在粉丝多年呼声后被选中开发007游戏的情况颇为相似。

paragraphs.en: Warhorse's game enters development during a period when The Lord of the Rings is having a bit of a resurgence. Although the franchise has always remained in the zeitgeist, a new live-action film known as The Lord of the Rings: The Hunt for Gollum is actively in the works. Some of the cast from the original trilogy will return for the new film, giving it a degree of credibility among fans. It seems unlikely that the game will be released in time for that film, but there is another opportunity.
paragraphs.cn: Warhorse这款新作的开发，恰逢《指环王》IP再度回潮的时期。尽管这个系列一直未曾远离时代视野，但目前一部名为《指环王：寻找咕噜（The Lord of the Rings: The Hunt for Gollum）》的真人电影正在积极推进中。原三部曲中的部分演员将回归出演，使本片在粉丝中具备一定可信度。游戏看来不太可能赶在这部电影上映前发售，但另一个契机或许还有机会——

paragraphs.en: Stephen Colbert is penning the script for The Lord of the Rings: Shadow of the Past, a new film set over a decade after the death of Frodo and inspired by unadapted chapters from The Fellowship of the Ring. That film has no release date, so maybe there could be some synergy there later down the line.
paragraphs.cn: 斯蒂芬·科尔伯特（Stephen Colbert）正在为另一部新片《指环王：往昔之影（The Lord of the Rings: Shadow of the Past）》撰写剧本，故事设定在弗罗多去世十多年后，灵感来自《魔戒同盟》中尚未被影像化的章节。这部电影目前还没有发售日期，未来或许可以与Warhorse的游戏形成某种联动。
